cmd.app_tour_done: Cakke wot mar nyuto — ti ki Anyim me wot.
cmd.app_tour_hint: Wot ma tela me jami madongo
cmd.clear_my_answers_done: Moko i dialog me jwayo dokogwa ni.
cmd.clear_my_answers_hint: Cak doki dokogwa ni i tic man
cmd.clear_workspace: Jwa jami weng ki cak manyen
cmd.clear_workspace_hint: Golo jami matye ki gin ma okato — penyo mukwongo
cmd.create_lesson_done: Cakke yo me kwan i kom “
cmd.create_lesson_done3: — AlloBot bitelo kit ma lubo anyim.
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Cakke yo me kwan ma kitelo — AlloBot bipenyo wii lok ni.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Cakke yo ma kitelo — tit wii lok ki kero
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: Lok lyet, sepia, col, ma konyo dyslexia, ki mukene
cmd.export_pack_hint: Gam kwan calo gin acel ma cung kene
cmd.font_bigger_hint: +2 i dit me coc me kwano
cmd.font_reset_done: Dit me coc odwoko i dit ma gicimo.
cmd.font_smaller_done: Dit me coc odok piny i
cmd.font_smaller_hint: −2 i dit me coc me kwano
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Tim niang i kom jami matye
cmd.generate_glossary_hint: Yub glossary ki i jami matye
cmd.generate_outline_hint: Yub cik ki i jami matye
cmd.generate_quiz_done: Yubo apenya ki i jami man…
cmd.generate_quiz_hint: Yub apenya ki i jami matye
cmd.generate_sentence_frames_hint: Yub frame me ukinkin ki i jami matye
cmd.generate_simplified_hint: Yub dit me kwano ma yot — tit “i kero N” pi gin ma imito
cmd.go_dashboard_hint: Dok i nen madit me kwan
cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Kwan glossary man calo deck me flashcard
cmd.line_spacing_less: Dwok kabedo i kin laini piny
cmd.line_spacing_less_done: Kabedo i kin laini ocib i
cmd.line_spacing_more_done: Kabedo i kin laini ocib i
cmd.open_accessibility_lab_hint: Rot & yub doko maber me donyo
cmd.open_class_session_done: Dialog me cokke me klas oyabbe.
cmd.open_class_session_hint: Cak onyo donyo i cokke me klas ma tye atir
cmd.open_community_catalog_hint: Nen kwan ma gipoko i kacokke
cmd.open_document_builder_hint: Yub ki gam coc ma gipokopoko
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: Educator Hub oyabbe — kad me Document Pipeline tye cok ki wii.
cmd.open_educator_hub_hint: Jami me kwan + kad me Document Pipeline
cmd.open_learning_hub_hint: Tugi, pwony, ki jami me kwan
cmd.open_lumen_hint: Lok data me rot odoko cart
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Penya persona me AI i kom lok man
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: AI, lok ki dwan, ki gat me Socratic pi project acel acel
cmd.open_sel_hub_hint: Jami me kwan me cwiny ki wat pa dano
cmd.open_stem_lab_hint: Jami me ngec ki kwano ma timme
cmd.open_submission_inbox: Yab inbox me tic ma gicwalo
cmd.open_submission_inbox_done: Inbox me tic ma gicwalo oyabbe.
cmd.open_symbol_studio_hint: Bao me AAC & jami me nen
cmd.open_translate_hint: Bok jami matye i leb mukene
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Kabedo me Downloads — PDF ma giketo tag aye copy ma tye atera me poko.
cmd.pipeline_downloads_hint: Wot piny i kabedo me Downloads
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Yub mukene me dwoko nio malo
cmd.pipeline_jump_miss: Kabedo meno pe tye i wang kombedi.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: Ojwa woko — twol coc manyen me cakke.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Jwa adwogi man ki twol coc manyen
cmd.pipeline_score: Score na me donyo tye adi?
cmd.pipeline_score_hint: Loko ma con → ma anyim me kombedi
cmd.pipeline_score_none: Pe tye yub me donyo ma oyabbe.
cmd.pipeline_stop: Cung yub ma tye ka tic
cmd.pipeline_stop_done: Cung lacen me round ma tye kombedi.
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Cung lacen me round ma tye — gwoko gin ma otimme
cmd.pipeline_tour_hint: Wot me cekwn 60 i adwogi me donyo
cmd.pipeline_verification_hint: Wot piny i kabedo me Verification
cmd.read_this_page_done: Lakwan me pot oyabbe — yer ka me cakke.
cmd.submit_work_hint: Cwal tic ni bot lapwony ni
cmd.switch_theme_done: Theme olokke — lok lyet, ka col, ka acentro madit.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Yabo dialog me yee me cloud-sync — moko kunnu me yabo.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Cib tic ni i cloud (penyo yee tyen mukwongo)
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Lok rangi mayot i wii pot
cmd.toggle_focus_mode_hint: Dwok jami weng piny ento jami matye
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: Kit me kony olokke — dii gin mo me ngeyo wi gin meno.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: Dii gin mo me ngeyo gin ma timo
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_hint: Laini ma cwero me lubo kwano
cmd.toggle_socratic_hint: Larem me kwan ma penyo mukwongo
cmd.toggle_visual_supports_hint: Cal me kony i nget coc
cmd.translate_document_done2: ki onyuto pwod — dii Translate me tiyo. (Boko leb tic ki quota me AI, mumiyo diyo dong meri.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Pongo leb mukwongo ki nyut pwod
cmd.translate_document_pick: Onyuto jami me boko leb — yer leb ki dii Translate.
cmd.undo_settings: Dwok lok me cik ma agikki
cmd.undo_settings_done: Odwoko cik ni ma okato (ka tye lok mo me dwoko).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Dwok cik me kwan ma okato (pe jami ma giyubo)
cmd.voice_start_done: Loc ki dwan otye. Tit cik calo “coc madit” onyo “yab educator hub”. Tit “cung winyo” me tyeko.
cmd.voice_start_hint: AlloBot winyo cik nio wa icung
cmd.voice_stop_done: Loc ki dwan ocung — gicayo microphone woko.
cmd.zen_on_done: Kit me zen otye — dii Ctrl+K ki ti “wek zen” me dwogo.
cmd.zen_on_hint: Kan jami weng ento jami matye
palette.footer: Tic ducu kityeko tito. Ctrl+K loko.
palette.no_match: Pe tye cik ma rwatte. Lok me bot (ki dwan oromo bino) niang kwac ma lengo.
palette.placeholder: Coo cik — “coc madit”, “educator hub”, “kwan pot man”…
